---
title: "Browse Datasets"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<p>
Datasets for statistics and data science tests, quizzes, and class activities, submitted by teachers.
Sort or filter any column to narrow the list — just like the Google Sheet — then click a dataset name
for its full page with a data explorer and download links.
Have a dataset to share? <a href="https://amstat.jotform.com/team/education/ssdse-dataset-repository-submission">Submit it here</a>.
</p>

<p id="ds-count" class="text-muted"></p>

<div id="master-table-wrap">
  <table id="master-table" class="table table-striped table-hover" style="width:100%" data-quarto-disable-processing="true">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Dataset</th>
        <th>Description</th>
        <th>Topics</th>
        <th>File type</th>
        <th>Cleanliness</th>
        <th>Real / synthetic</th>
        <th>Availability</th>
        <th>Obs</th>
        <th>Cat vars</th>
        <th>Num vars</th>
        <th>Submitted by</th>
        <th>Date</th>
      </tr>
      <tr class="filter-row"></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody></tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<script>
// Columns that get a dropdown filter (low-cardinality) vs. a text filter.
const SELECT_COLS = { 2: "topics", 3: "plain", 4: "plain", 5: "plain", 6: "plain" };
const TEXT_COLS = [0, 1, 10];

function esc(s) {
  return String(s ?? "").replace(/&/g, "&amp;").replace(/</g, "&lt;").replace(/>/g, "&gt;").replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
}

fetch("datasets.json")
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => {
    const rows = data.map(d => [
      `<a class="ds-name" href="${esc(d.href)}">${esc(d.name)}</a>`,
      `<span class="ds-desc">${esc(d.description)}</span>`,
      (d.topics || []).map(t => `<span class="topic-badge">${esc(t)}</span>`).join(" "),
      esc(d.file_type),
      esc(d.clean),
      esc(d.real_synthetic),
      esc(d.availability),
      esc(d.n_obs),
      esc(d.n_cat),
      esc(d.n_num),
      esc(d.submitter),
      esc(d.date)
    ]);

    document.getElementById("ds-count").textContent =
      `${data.length} dataset${data.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} in the repository`;

    // Build the filter row cells (match the real header cell count).
    const nCols = document.querySelectorAll("#master-table thead tr:first-child th").length;
    const filterRow = document.querySelector("#master-table thead tr.filter-row");
    filterRow.innerHTML = "";
    for (let i = 0; i < nCols; i++) filterRow.appendChild(document.createElement("th"));

    const table = $("#master-table").DataTable({
      data: rows,
      order: [[11, "desc"]],
      pageLength: 25,
      lengthMenu: [10, 25, 50, 100],
      autoWidth: false,
      columnDefs: [
        { targets: 1, className: "ds-desc" },
        { targets: [7, 8, 9], className: "text-end" }
      ],
      orderCellsTop: true,
      initComplete: function () {
        const api = this.api();

        api.columns().every(function (idx) {
          const col = this;
          const cell = filterRow.children[idx];

          if (idx in SELECT_COLS) {
            const select = document.createElement("select");
            select.innerHTML = `<option value="">All</option>`;
            const values = new Set();
            col.data().each(v => {
              if (SELECT_COLS[idx] === "topics") {
                // strip badge markup, split multi-select topics
                const tmp = document.createElement("div");
                tmp.innerHTML = v;
                tmp.querySelectorAll(".topic-badge").forEach(b => values.add(b.textContent.trim()));
              } else if (v) {
                values.add(String(v).trim());
              }
            });
            [...values].sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b)).forEach(v => {
              const o = document.createElement("option");
              o.value = v; o.textContent = v;
              select.appendChild(o);
            });
            select.addEventListener("change", () => {
              const v = select.value;
              col.search(v ? $.fn.dataTable.util.escapeRegex(v) : "", true, false).draw();
            });
            cell.appendChild(select);
          } else if (TEXT_COLS.includes(idx)) {
            const input = document.createElement("input");
            input.type = "search";
            input.placeholder = "Filter…";
            input.addEventListener("keyup", () => col.search(input.value).draw());
            cell.appendChild(input);
          }
        });
      }
    });
  })
  .catch(err => {
    document.getElementById("ds-count").textContent =
      "Could not load the dataset list. If you are previewing locally, run scripts/build.py first.";
    console.error(err);
  });
</script>
```
